notes: The lower temperature (0.1) reps are markedly more reliable than 0.7 reps at this model size: t0.7 produced one empty HTML blob (rep0) and two fabricated-artist attributions (Dries Aerts, David Fickling) plus a lighthouse hallucination. Two responses overall (rep1 t0.4 and rep4 t0.1) collapse into repetition loops with invented text/costumes. Notably none of the 15 responses located Waldo, Odlaw, or Wizard Whitebeard — the model describes the scene but never engages the 'find the character' task. The rarely-correct details (horizon landmass, crosses-on-roof = hovercraft fans, human pyramid, volleyball, horses) appear only sporadically; rep2@t0.1 is the single best all-round description.
